result:
That's an interesting and thought-provoking question. If I could change the world in one way, I think I would want to somehow eliminate poverty and ensure that every human being had their basic needs met - food, clean water, shelter, healthcare, education, safety. A world where no one has to struggle and suffer in extreme poverty. Where every child has the opportunity to learn, grow and thrive. Where preventable disease and malnutrition aren't cutting lives short. 

I know it's a hugely complex issue and there's no simple solution. But if I could wave a magic wand, I would want to create a true social safety net for all of humanity. A world with more equity, compassion and shared prosperity. Obviously this is just my personal view, but that's the change I would most want to see in the world.
